name: Cory Booker
subject: We need 109 people from Pennsylvania to step up tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, A few days ago, our campaign set a goal to raise **$725,000** by the end of the month. We also learned that we need to grow our grassroots team to **200,000 unique donors** to qualify for the December debate. **We 're so close to reaching both of these goals, team, but we need 109 more donors from Pennsylvania to step up tonight to keep us on track. Can you help us out?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
| | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191029_CB_20191029-fr-CB-microgoals-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20.20,50,100")

---

These goals can seem pretty daunting at first. But if my career in public service has taught me anything, it's that _when we come together, we can achieve the seemingly impossible._
That starts with 109 people from Pennsylvania stepping up tonight. [**So before you go to bed, will you chip in to get us one step closer to our goal?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191029_CB_20191029-fr-CB-microgoals-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Together,
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191029_CB_20191029-fr-CB-microgoals-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Team Beshear
subject: BREAKING: Bevin bailout
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
This election is about right vs wrong. We need to make sure that we're able to break through the noise and close out a huge win.
|
---

| | | **ALERT: BEVIN BAILOUT

Bevin's buddies poured more than $600,000 into their ad buy only a few hours ago _today_.** Now more than ever we need our grassroots supporters to step up to help us reach our new wiring goal.

~~Wiring Goal: $6,000~~
NEW WIRING GOAL: $12,000
Deadline: MIDNIGHT
---
| | **[RUSH MY SUPPORT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557995/ad6dc73/1440b694/db7148b/3927859733/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxNyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-lastdeadline2?refcode=20191029.2nd__417__&amount=5")**
---

Peter, earlier today Jacqueline reached out to you about our final wiring deadline of the campaign. **Since her message, Bevin 's buddies dumped $600,000 to flood the airwaves with his fear-mongering, misleading ads.**

With only one week left before Election Day, how much we raise today could make or break this campaign. There are still far too many Kentuckians who are undecided in this race right now. But we know if voters hear our positive message about our Kentucky values and how we are going to build a bigger, better future, we'll win.

**Will you make sure we can fully fund our $12,000 ad buy with a last-minute donation right now?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557995/ad6dc73/1440b694/db71488/3927859733/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxNyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-lastdeadline2?express_lane=true&refcode=20191029.2nd__417__&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557995/ad6dc73/1440b694/db71489/3927859733/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxNyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-lastdeadline2?express_lane=true&refcode=20191029.2nd__417__&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557995/ad6dc73/1440b694/db7148e/3927859733/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxNyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-lastdeadline2?express_lane=true&refcode=20191029.2nd__417__&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557995/ad6dc73/1440b694/db7148f/3927859733/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxNyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-lastdeadline2?express_lane=true&refcode=20191029.2nd__417__&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557995/ad6dc73/1440b694/db7148c/3927859733/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxNyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-lastdeadline2?express_lane=true&refcode=20191029.2nd__417__&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557995/ad6dc73/1440b694/db7148d/3927859733/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxNyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-lastdeadline2?refcode=20191029.2nd__417__")**
While Bevin can rely on out-of-state special interest groups to keep his sinking campaign afloat, we rely on grassroots supporters like you. The stakes are too high to sit this one out, Peter. Please, rush your support before we wire our final payment to keep our ads on the air.

Thanks,
Team Beshear

| **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557995/ad6dc73/1440b694/db7148b/3927859733/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxNyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-lastdeadline2?refcode=20191029.2nd__417__&amount=5")**

name: Alana Conant, Team Hick
subject: [VOTE] A taco, a shark, or Yoda?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
John and Robin are deciding on a Halloween costume for their dog, Skye, and we thought it'd be great to have this team make the final decision on what Skye will dress up as. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771492/691c9bd/6fea3832/11a78f44/584250305/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team, I wanted to introduce myself--I'm Alana, Team Hick's Digital Director. One part of my job is how to make sure we put the "fun" in this upcoming fundraising deadline, which just so happens to fall on Halloween.

**We 'd like to get you in on the fun.** John and Robin are deciding on a Halloween costume for their dog, Skye, and we thought it'd be great to have this team make the final decision on what Skye will dress up as. [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191029_AC_20191029-fr-AC-EOM4-all_all_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") **Below, click on the costume you 'd like to see Skye wear and chip in whatever amount you like. The costume that gets the most donations will be modeled by Skye this Halloween.** [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191029_AC_20191029-fr-AC-EOM4-all_all_taco&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191029_AC_20191029-fr-AC-EOM4-all_all_shark&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191029_AC_20191029-fr-AC-EOM4-all_all_yoda&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") **And yes, we will be sending photos of Skye modeling the winner!**

Happy Halloween,

Alana

Alana Conant
Digital Director
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191029_AC_20191029-fr-AC-EOM4-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771492/691c9bd/6fea3832/11a78f7e/584250305/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771492/691c9bd/6fea3832/11a78f7f/584250305/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771492/691c9bd/6fea3832/11a78f7c/584250305/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771492/691c9bd/6fea3832/11a78f7d/584250305/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771492/691c9bd/6fea3832/11a78f7a/584250305/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771492/691c9bd/6fea3832/11a78f7b/584250305/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771492/691c9bd/6fea3832/11a78f7e/584250305/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro=E2=80=99s_last_stand?=
subject: RE: Tom Steyer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | **[_Billionaire Tom Steyer just personally bought his way onto the next debate stage. But the DNC just announced a 200K-donor requirement to make the next round -- and Juli an is more than 90% of the way there! We MUST help him meet his End of Month goal to keep his critical voice in this race. Your gift will be matched until the deadline! >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191029_em_fr_b4_jcls_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

Everything -- everything -- is on the line right now.

Billionaire Tom Steyer just pumped $47 million of his own money to buy a spot in the next debates.

Meanwhile, if Julian doesn't raise $800,000 by Thursday's End of Month Deadline -- **he will have no choice but to exit this race.** ** ** | ****CASTRO MATCH: ACTIVE**** ** ** ****NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com**** ** ** | **[**_Suggested Support: $5 >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191029_em_fr_b4_jcls_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**
---

Julian's voice in the debates has been the most critical on that stage.

Now, more than ever, we need to rise up and rescue his spot in the next round.

We can't risk losing such an important voice in this race.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I’m going to get real about where we’re at in this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I want to be honest with you about the state of this campaign.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2384%2E377263%2Ep5U7WD) Yang Gang --

I’m going to get real about where we’re at in this campaign.

While we are growing in the polls, we are still behind many of our opponents in terms of fundraising, staff on the ground, and advertisements on the air and online.

We set a goal of raising $1.5 million by the end of the month so that we could go up on TV with ads -- **but right now we still need to raise $570,275 to hit it.**

I think we can get back on track and hit this crucial goal, but it’s going to take an extraordinary effort from every member on this team to do it. **[Can you pitch in $10 or more before midnight so we can hit our goal?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15337?t=5&akid=2384%2E377263%2Ep5U7WD)** | [Pitch in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15337?t=8&akid=2384%2E377263%2Ep5U7WD)
---
I’m the husband to an amazing woman and the father of two young boys.

I know the country my sons will grow up in is going to be very different from the one I grew up in, and I want to look back at my life knowing I did everything in my power to create the kind of future our children deserve. An America of opportunity and abundance. An America that invests in its people so they can build the lives they want for themselves and their families.

**[I hope you feel the same and are compelled to donate in this moment so we can build this America together. Please pitch in $10 or more now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15337?t=7&akid=2384%2E377263%2Ep5U7WD)**

This fight is too important to sit back,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15337?t=6&akid=2384%2E377263%2Ep5U7WD)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=2384%2E377263%2Ep5U7WD) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2384%2E377263%2Ep5U7WD) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Our voices must be heard for democracy to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Next Tuesday, voters have an opportunity to make change happen by showing up to vote and casting their ballots. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54b/34a064cc/1b21908d/7037897/1428612569/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - My parents were members of the civil rights movement, and my father got arrested helping people register to vote in Mississippi when he was just 16 years old. My mom was doing the same work, although she was smart enough not to get caught. I grew up in a family of agitators; my family believed that you cannot wait for change to come - you must set out to make change happen. Next week, Georgians will vote in municipal elections, and in Kentucky, Louisiana, Mississippi, Virginia, and states across the country, voters have an opportunity to make change happen by showing up to vote and casting their ballots. But our voices must be heard for democracy to work. [**Fair Fight has a simple premise, that democracy belongs to all of us. Will you make your first donation today so that we can help protect the rights of voters in Tuesday 's elections?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54b/34a064cc/1b21908d/7037894/1428612569/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019/refcode=IE102919SYA-3a-x") We have to be agitators for our democracy, friend. We have to be agitators for justice. We know that changing the status quo will require all of us to be part of this movement for free, fair elections. Because when we ensure that every eligible voter can access the ballot and have their vote fairly counted, we are in pursuit of a new kind of collective power: the power to control our lives, to change our fates, and to win progress for our communities. Make no mistake: our fight is just beginning, because elections are about people, and the people have the right to be heard in every election, every time. Thank you for helping us make change happen. Yours in the fight,
Stacey Abrams **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54b/34a064cc/1b21908d/7037894/1428612569/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019/refcode=IE102919SYA-3a-x")**
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54b/34a064cc/1b21908d/7037895/1428612569/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54b/34a064cc/1b21908d/7037892/1428612569/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54b/34a064cc/1b21908d/7037893/1428612569/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

subject: Convene the world for climate change

body:
Peter,
Since I announced my candidacy, I've said it again and again: climate change is the biggest threat we face as a country and as part of one interconnected world. We cannot defuse this ticking time bomb alone. **That's why we need someone with a depth and breadth of global leadership experience in the White House - to convene the world to tackle climate change together.**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11349558/115495609/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJmNzkzYi0wMGZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoTLk5ivgHEoVsictLL6L00zCyYMggGVGJwf142Iazc=&refcode=em103019climate)
As I wrote in my Washington Examiner op-ed: "**This global challenge must be tackled by the entire world. We face a harsh reality that there is nothing we can do just by ourselves — absolutely nothing — to protect America from the most destructive threat to mankind.** If America were to reach net-zero greenhouse emissions (as the Green New Deal rightly calls for), it would achieve only 15% of the required reduction to disarm this catastrophic threat before it explodes on all of us. That's because 85% of emissions come from the rest of the world. Consider Saudi Arabia, which will use as much energy in 2030 to run air conditioners as it exports in oil today."
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11349559/115495610/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJmNzkzYi0wMGZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoTLk5ivgHEoVsictLL6L00zCyYMggGVGJwf142Iazc=&refcode=em103019climate)
My op-ed continues, "**We cannot beat climate change without all of the world coming together, led by us, to save the planet. We must not just rejoin, but actually lead the Paris process to collectively increase and enforce national commitments.** "
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11349560/115495611/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJmNzkzYi0wMGZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoTLk5ivgHEoVsictLL6L00zCyYMggGVGJwf142Iazc=&refcode=em103019climate)
"We must first and foremost convene the world to ensure that all 196 signatories of the Paris Climate Agreement fulfill their obligations. We can only do that through smart diplomacy and re-engaging with our allies. That’s why **we need a president who actually understands the world and the value of our friendships and alliances. For the good of our own nation as well as that of the entire globe, we must come together now.** "
**If you believe we need a President who can convene the world to tackle climate change, contribute today. **And read my whole piece below.
Warmest regards, Joe

and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.

My Washington Examiner op-ed in full, [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11349563/115495614/179838860?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJmNzkzYi0wMGZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoTLk5ivgHEoVsictLL6L00zCyYMggGVGJwf142Iazc=&emci=e1f2e34e-98fa-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=eebf793b-00fb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798) and below:
# Fighting climate change is vital to our national security, but we need to convene the world to do it
by Joe Sestak
In 2001, as the commander of an aircraft carrier battle group arriving in the Arabian Sea to begin strikes against Afghanistan, I witnessed a beautiful sight along with my 10,000 sailors, SEALS, and Marines. Waiting there to become part of our fleet was an international armada. The Japanese, who had not sent ships out of the Sea of Japan since the World War II, were there. Alongside them were Germany and Italy, our other former foes.
Ships had come from around the globe — from Canada, Poland, Australia, and more. We had the world with us, and in that distant sea was the realization that America’s greatest power is not our military, but our power to convene, to bring the peoples and nations of the world together for a common cause that serves us all.
Today, we must convene the world once more because the next few years may prove to be the most important in human history. In perhaps less than a decade, the worst seeds of the irreversible consequences of climate change will have been sown. Unless uprooted, they will eventually grow into wars because of desperate drought and famine; violent seizing and hoarding of diminished global resources; economic shocks for poor and rich alike; and the abandonment of the idea that governments can actually provide for their peoples’ general welfare, as the relentless rise of global heat and oceans takes an uncontrollable toll on their citizens.
We cannot simply continue the head-in-the-sand policies of the current administration. We must listen to the scientists whose well-studied facts and figures consistently show that global warming is an unambiguously grave threat to humanity and all life on earth. According to our own Defense Department, climate change “poses immediate risk to U.S. national security.” Already, we are seeing climate change play a role in migration, such as from Central America, and in war, such as in Syria.
Yet this global challenge must be tackled by the entire world. We face a harsh reality that there is nothing we can do just by ourselves — absolutely nothing — to protect America from the most destructive threat to mankind. If America were to reach net-zero greenhouse emissions (as the Green New Deal rightly calls for), it would achieve only 15% of the required reduction to disarm this catastrophic threat before it explodes on all of us. That's because 85% of emissions come from the rest of the world. Consider Qatar, where they are now using air conditioning to cool outdoor soccer stadiums. Or Saudi Arabia, which will use as much energy in 2030 to run air conditioners as it exports in oil today.
We cannot beat climate change without all of the world coming together, led by us, to save the planet. We must not just rejoin, but actually lead the Paris process to collectively increase and enforce national commitments.
Additionally, we must ratify the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol, mandating the phasing out of hydrofluorocarbons (HFCs) — commonly used as refrigerants — which evaporate as a greenhouse gas 1000 times more potent than CO2. This is particularly important, as currently only 8% of people in the tropics have air conditioning, but eventually, most will. And if they do not use the most efficient air conditioning technology currently available, it will be the equivalent of deforesting two-thirds of the Amazon.
Of course, we must lead at home. We need to eliminate our own dependency on carbon fuels through the efficient incentives of the marketplace. The increase in prices by a fee placed on fossil fuel producers that periodically increases (which will be refunded to every citizen as a dividend) will result in reduced emissions. We also need to invest a portion of those carbon fees into research and development, such as ensuring a cost-efficient way to scale up available technology to remove as much carbon dioxide from the air as humans are putting there.
We also need to stop tax subsidies to fossil fuel corporations and provide them to the growing green energy sector that will create millions of jobs. This was one of the reasons I called for a moratorium on natural gas fracking in Pennsylvania while running for the U.S. Senate.
We must also recognize that a huge percentage of global greenhouse gas emissions come from agriculture and land use. The Rodale Institute has studied this topic for many years and calculates that if we converted 100% of all crop and pasture land to regenerative organic practices, we would remove more carbon dioxide from the atmosphere every year than our current carbon emissions level. We must stop subsidizing emissions-heavy industrial farming — which generally only benefits large corporations and wealthy landowners — and start heavily subsidizing organic and regenerative farming.
There is more we must do, from increasing fuel efficiency standards to incentives for repair — not constant replacement — of our consumer devices, such as smartphones.
Yet even as we do this at home, to ensure that we do our part to protect this planet and lead by example, we must first and foremost convene the world to ensure that all 196 signatories of the Paris Climate Agreement fulfill their obligations. We can only do that through smart diplomacy and re-engaging with our allies. That’s why we need a president who actually understands the world and the value of our friendships and alliances. For the good of our own nation as well as that of the entire globe, we must come together now.
_Joe Sestak, a former Navy Admiral and congressman from Pennsylvania, is currently a Democratic Presidential candidate._

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.
Joe Sestak for President
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

body:
We have a huge opportunity to help Conservatives take back the House by reaching this critical FEC deadline.

Kevin McCarthy emailed you.

Dan Crenshaw emailed you.

Now, I'm emailing you.

Our End of Month FEC deadline is approaching fast and we are still 1,000 Trump supporters away from our goal. Meeting our FEC deadlines is crucial for Conservative efforts in 2020.

body:
http://lipinskiforcongress.com/ [http://lipinskiforcongress.com/]
We have volunteers excited to spread Dan’s commonsense message throughout IL-03, and we need your help to keep them in the field throughout the fall!

We have $4,994 to raise before tomorrow at midnight! Contribute now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_1_2&amount=15&recurring=true]

Begin forwarded message from Dan Lipinski:

Peter,

I’m so grateful — so many community members have shown up to volunteer, eager to help us with our ramped-up campaign.
But our volunteers need your support to reach every corner of IL-03.

We need to raise another $6,000 for our Fall Organizing Fund before the end of the month to keep our volunteers out in the field, spreading our message.

Can you rush a grassroots contribution now to help us reach our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_1_2&amount=15&recurring=true]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below.

Donate $15 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_1_2&amount=15&express_lane=true]

Donate $25 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_1_2&amount=25&express_lane=true]

Donate $50 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_1_2&amount=50&express_lane=true]

Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_1_2&amount=15&recurring=true]

Peter, I understand if you can’t come out and volunteer, but you can still make a massive difference by chipping in a few dollars to keep our field offices stocked with the supplies we need.

These next few months will be critical for us to knock doors and reach voters in every pocket of the district.

Chip in $15 or more before midnight on Thursday:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_1_2&amount=15&recurring=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_1_2&amount=15&recurring=true]

Thanks for your support,

Dan

Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to like Dan on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/danlipinskiforcongress/] or follow Dan on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DanLipinski] . If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can click here to support Dan’s reelection now. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Whole lot scarier than ghosts or goblins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Halloween is coming up fast... and so is our deadline! Read more >>>
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=8f82407d5f7c6daf2746895bab8e1ea33eb4fa8de8b60ba9a4442a33724d38f07f33a4042481527586ed47c10a1edf39c69a246eafbd6641)
---
| | | Peter,

Halloween is almost here, and so is our October fundraising deadline.

Today, I'm writing to ask for your help.

_**[We're launching a Halloween "Money Bomb" to reach our goal, and EVERY contribution is a huge help!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=8f82407d5f7c6daf0556c9ef54617eadd28e545e29a23200297cb667c0118dae71c355ab44dc4f6cecdf28673b13a04c93d2033b81894d54 "We’re launching a 72-hour “Money Bomb” to reach our goal, and EVERY contribution is a huge help!")**_

Truth be told, there's something a whole lot scarier than witches, ghosts, or goblins invading our country.

**Political correctness is DESTROYING the America we know and love... and now we have the Democrats rushing to embrace socialism!**

From banning prayer in our schools to demanding recognition of 63 genders to creating "safe spaces" on college campuses, political correctness is about SILENCING the truth.

I'm fed up with it, and it's a big part of why I'm running for U.S. Senate. We need more leaders in Washington like President Trump, who are not afraid to call out political correctness, speak the truth, and fight for our traditional values.

If you agree, then I need your help. We're working to raise $7,200 before our deadline tomorrow night.

_**[Please chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 today](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=8f82407d5f7c6daf82c398df7e8b63ec1e3440dee14f3c85f913d2387e1828a1c8a39bae19e68a9caff027a11d353c43dd704d0f143d5caa "Please chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 today")**_ , or more if you can, to help us reach this important goal and kick off November strong.

\- Coach Tuberville

If you agree, then I need your help. We're working to raise $7,200 before our deadline tomorrow night. With JUST DAYS to go, I hope to count on your help. Let’s face it... witches, ghosts, and goblins have nothing on these radical-left socialist Democrats. There is NOTHING scarier than the agenda Ilhan Omar and Tina Smith have for America! . We’re gearing up for the most aggressive and hard-fought U.S. Senate campaign in Minnesota in decades. I’m in this race to win, and so is President Trump, who has given me his enthusiastic endorsement. These radical Democrats aren’t like the Democrats of yesteryear. They hate everything America stands for. They want higher taxes, socialized medicine, and open borders... and just weeks ago, we saw how their supporters – brain-dead leftist zombies – will take to the streets to violently attack conservatives and the police! We MUST take back Minnesota in 2020. This is our chance to help re-elect President Trump and fire do-nothing ultra-liberal Tina Smith. It’s time we ALL step up to make happen. . Thank you for ALL your support in this race! \- Jason id:2019-10-14-16:26:33:327t | | Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate |

name: Corky Messner
subject: Let's turn New Hampshire “RED” in 2020!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Does the number 2,736 ring a bell? We’ve mentioned it several times over the last few weeks. It’s the number of votes Hillary Clinton carried New Hampshire by in 2016.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ed89d39b791aae67/0dea2349c77ad4d5c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,

Does the number 2,736 ring a bell?

We’ve mentioned it several times over the last few weeks. It’s the number of votes Hillary Clinton carried New Hampshire by in 2016.

**It was an incredibly narrow margin... and in 2020, we need to flip it.**

It’s vital that we turn New Hampshire “RED” next year, to help re-elect President Trump and DEFEAT liberal Jeanne Shaheen!

That’s what we’re working to make happen every single day, and we can’t let up.

Today, we’re launching an urgent 72-hour “Money Bomb” to raise $2,736 to close out October strong!

[**Will you donate $5 (or more if you can) to help us reach our goal?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ed89d39b791aae67/fb0704cb11c3b3f0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

With just over a year until Election Day, this race is heating up fast. The national Democrat campaign machine is desperate to re-elect Jeanne Shaheen... and we cannot allow them to fool voters!

**She DOES NOT represent our values, period**. We must expose her record and radical views, and build the strong statewide grassroots team it will take to win on November 3, 2020.

Thank you for standing with me in this fight. I hope to hear from you!

\- Corky

**[JUST DAYS until Oct 31st deadline – contribute here!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ed89d39b791aae67/e33389ca7b47f84fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ed89d39b791aae67/4937a986eff155a0c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ed89d39b791aae67/ccc2591fa5da8caec3d6b838967d376c/33153)

We needed 109 people from Pennsylvania to step up to keep us on track. **Well, team, we came up a little short.** And we need to increase today's goal to make up for lost ground and get back on track. But it's not too late. There are still a few days until our end-of-month deadline, and we're so close to reaching 200,000 unique donors. Will you chip in right now to put us over the top? subject: running out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I'm running out of time, so please forgive me for being blunt: **If I don 't meet my End of Month goal by midnight tomorrow -- I will have no choice but to exit this race.** [_**I have no doubt we can rescue this movement, but I 'm going to need everyone who believes in what we're fighting for to step up before midnight tomorrow. I've spent every second I have fighting for you. Now, I'm asking you to fight for me with $5. (Your gift will be matched until my deadline) >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") When I entered this race, I knew it would be the hardest fight of my life. I knew I'd be underestimated by the press... I knew I'd be competing against self-funding billionaires... I knew Trump would smear my heritage... **But I also knew millions of Americans needed a new voice fighting for them -- someone who personally knows what it means to struggle. ** I'm asking you to remember how critical our fight is before tomorrow's End of Month Deadline. And I need you to fight to keep me in this race. Can I count on your $5? **Hitting this goal is so critical, every gift will be matched for these last 24 hours.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc862/3eb3e2fc/55ff56f0/744dbcf4/2505830523/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191030_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1")**
---

**[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc862/3eb3e2fc/55ff56f0/744dbcf3/2505830523/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191030_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1")**
---

**[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc862/3eb3e2fc/55ff56f0/744dbcf2/2505830523/VEsC/p/eyJlM3QwYUdseVpGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20191030_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1")**
---

**[**Chip in $100 now >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc862/3eb3e2fc/55ff56f0/744dbcf1/2505830523/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20191030_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1")**
---

**[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**
---

Thank you so much,

Julian
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc862/3eb3e2fc/55ff56f0/744dbcf0/2505830523/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")

| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc862/3eb3e2fc/55ff56f0/744dbcff/2505830523/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/")

| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc862/3eb3e2fc/55ff56f0/744dbcfe/2505830523/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)

| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc862/3eb3e2fc/55ff56f0/744dbcfd/2505830523/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc862/3eb3e2fc/55ff56f0/744dbcfc/2505830523/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc862/3eb3e2fc/55ff56f0/744dbcfb/2505830523/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Paul Begala
subject: RE: Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I'll tell you why every top Democrat is emailing you: \-- Nancy Pelosi \-- Ben Ray Lujan \-- James Carville \-- Khizr Khan \-- Ted Lieu \-- Deb Haaland \-- Pramila Jayapal \-- Jacky Rosen \-- Gabby Giffords That's because this is the biggest deadline Ben Ray has ever faced in his Senate race. If we fall short, we could squander our once-in-a-lifetime shot to defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate! [**_Can I count on you to help Ben Ray out with $5 before his massive end-of-month deadline in 24 hours? He needs 1,211 Democrats to step up before the deadline >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b1_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") Everybody under the sun has been asking me: Can we really defeat Mitch McConnell for the first time in 30 years? I'll tell you what I always say: I KNOW this is our best shot in decades to oust McConnell -- AND defeat his entire Republican Senate. **But our chances take a huge hit if we lose Ben Ray's critical Senate race in New Mexico.** Can I count on your $5 before Ben Ray's critical deadline in 24 hours? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b1_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

******[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b1_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")******

******[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b1_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")******

Thank you,

Paul

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44e/18e32a7f/539b19ae/7b231384/1260489716/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44e/18e32a7f/539b19ae/7b231385/1260489716/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44e/18e32a7f/539b19ae/7b2313ba/1260489716/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44e/18e32a7f/539b19ae/7b2313bb/1260489716/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44e/18e32a7f/539b19ae/7b2313b8/1260489716/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44e/18e32a7f/539b19ae/7b2313b9/1260489716/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Team Bennet
subject: Morning news update (some good, some bad)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team, there's some good news and some bad news:

The Good News: When we announced our $175,OOO Halloween goal, you all really stepped up to make sure we'd hit our target!!

The Bad News: Over the last 48 hours, the pace of donations has slowed significantly, and if we don't hustle, we'll risk coming up short!

If we don't hit this goal, we won't be able to keep running TV ads, expanding our field offices, and reaching out to voters on the ground.

We can't afford to let momentum slow down now.

[It's crucial that we keep our fundraising growing as we move to persuade undecided voters across the country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaeab/134673f2/a31e21e/6997f58c/469352925/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B1_103019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lindsey=20Graham?=
subject: Important Ask
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
| |
---
| |
#
Dear Peter,

If the Democrats win in 2020, their socialist agenda will transform America as we know it for the worse. Our Republican Senate majority is truly the last line of defense! [**That’s why I’m emailing you today about my friend, Senator David Perdue.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=81b659ab80&e=02cd889ad3)

David has stood with me to confirm conservative judges, including Justice Brett Kavanaugh. He’s helped President Trump cut taxes, rebuild our military, and reduce regulations. He’s called out the radical Left’s destructive, socialist agenda.

Simply put, David is a champion for our shared conservative values.
But all of this great work has made David one of the top Republicans targeted for defeat by the radical Left. [**So, I’m personally asking you to join me in helping David fight back! ** ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6b364f6b48&e=02cd889ad3)

---
| [DONATE NOW >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e1f695d750&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW >>>")
---
| **Let me tell you a little more about David. **He’s a living example of the American Dream.

David paid his way through college. His first job after graduating was at a Head Start program. He then embarked on a 40-year career in business. He’s turned around companies, created jobs, and helped working families do better.

After all of this, David ran for the U.S. Senate to make a difference. And, believe me, he’s made a BIG difference.

[**We need leaders like David Perdue in the Senate so we can continue growing our economy, delivering results, and holding the radical Left accountable. Please join me in supporting him today.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=7ca0a8089d&e=02cd889ad3)

---
| [STAND WITH DAVID >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c256a0a6a7&e=02cd889ad3 "STAND WITH DAVID >>>")
---
| I support David Perdue because he’s doing this for the right reasons. I need David with me in the Senate to keep up the fight, but the Left is going to do whatever they can to stop that from happening.

[**That’s why it’s critical we fight back now. I’m asking you to join me in supporting David. Please give whatever you can afford today.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b8694ac319&e=02cd889ad3)

Sincerely,
[](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=805f262241&e=02cd889ad3)
Lindsey Graham
United States Senator

---
| [STAND WITH DAVID: GIVE NOW](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=56ac32513d&e=02cd889ad3 "STAND WITH DAVID: GIVE NOW")
---
| | | **PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
---
| We know we send a lot of emails, but the truth is: We're counting on you. David is an outsider, not a career politician. He got elected because of supporters like you. He's counting on your help to continue delivering results. These emails are critical to keeping you updated on ways you can help David make a difference. Thank you for all that you do!
---
|
---
| PO Box 12077, Atlanta, GA 30355
[Privacy Policy](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=be586b9d33&e=02cd889ad3)

Want to change how you receive these emails? We would hate to see you go - these emails are critical to our campaign - but you can [update your preferences](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3&c=44810bfa45)
---

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Peter, we must confront those like Steve King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

We must confront those -- like Steve King -- who use xenophobia, racism, and misogyny to sow seeds of fear and hatred amongst neighbors and turn us against each other.

**_[If you’re sick and tired of career politicians like Steve King using politics to divide us, please chip in $5 or more to our campaign before tomorrow’s end-of-month fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11367998/115654226/1796747094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGViNDM3NS00N2ZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8bKsHXidojeBjVmzQ3NynewKWyFIEurrKA1YkxvdCk=&refcode=em19_191030_eom3_l1)_**

I believe that all who call America home should be treated with dignity and respect. I believe all who work hard should share in our prosperity and have access to affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and strong public schools.

I believe people should have elected officials who are accessible and accountable to them.

I believe in you, Peter.

Throughout my life, both as a ballplayer and as a professional, I’ve worked to put others first. I believe in hard work, civility, and love of community.

I can promise you this: As your congressman, I will always show up. I will always listen to you and respect your opinion -- even if we disagree -- because we are all Iowans and Americans first. But to get there, I’ll need your help.

**_[Chip in $5 or more before tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline and let's win this election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11368000/115654239/1796747094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGViNDM3NS00N2ZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8bKsHXidojeBjVmzQ3NynewKWyFIEurrKA1YkxvdCk=&refcode=em19_191030_eom3_l2)_**

Thank you,

J.D. Scholten [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11368002/115654250/1796747094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGViNDM3NS00N2ZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8bKsHXidojeBjVmzQ3NynewKWyFIEurrKA1YkxvdCk=&refcode=em19_191030_eom3_button)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11368005/115654261/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGViNDM3NS00N2ZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8bKsHXidojeBjVmzQ3NynewKWyFIEurrKA1YkxvdCk=&emci=b5a7eb19-b7f9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=70eb4375-47fb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11368008/115654271/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGViNDM3NS00N2ZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8bKsHXidojeBjVmzQ3NynewKWyFIEurrKA1YkxvdCk=&emci=b5a7eb19-b7f9-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=70eb4375-47fb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013). name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: History Will Not Be Kind to Nancy Pelosi
body:
"One way or another, Nancy Pelosi will go down in history. Let’s hope she doesn’t take America with her." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=95eeb5cce3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **History Will Not Be Kind to Nancy Pelosi**

“One way or another, Nancy Pelosi will go down in history. Let’s hope she doesn’t take America with her,” Michael Goodwin writes in the _New York Post_.

Speaker Pelosi’s decision to go all in on impeachment “is a historic mistake, one that could tear America apart. Based on the evidence the House has made public, impeaching Trump is a meritless, reckless assault on democracy.”

Goodwin explains that “[Pelosi’s] real problem is that she doesn’t have the goods to justify impeachment under any process. And she won’t, no matter how many witnesses emerge from the bureaucracy to say they were unhappy with the Ukraine call or didn’t agree with Trump’s choices. Policy disagreements and murky arguments won’t lead to a public consensus for removing an elected president.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d466677f5e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration has unveiled a website aimed at helping millions of Americans with substance abuse issues learn about and locate treatment options,” Zeke Miller reports for _[**The Associated Press**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e53cd921e&e=3ee4985eea)_. The new website, called [**FindTreatment.gov**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=67b793c62c&e=3ee4985eea), “is the latest development in the administration’s effort to address the nation’s opioid crisis.”
---
|
---
| “Last weekend the Washington Post changed an appalling headline after readers expressed their disappointment. But the paper’s bizarre obituary for terrorist Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi may still need a rewrite,” James Freeman writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ead71dc8a&e=3ee4985eea)_. The first paragraph of their story about the dead ISIS leader still stunningly portrays Baghdadi as an “austere religious scholar.”
---
|
---
| In _[The Arizona Republic](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c378abb39&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Sen. Martha McSally (R-AZ) writes that she is ready to vote yes on President Trump’s updated NAFTA deal, the United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement—but can’t do so until House Democrats finally agree to let the bill come to a vote. “It’s not hard to see how much Arizona [and other American] communities, farmers, ranchers, manufacturers and business owners stand to gain from Congress finalizing the USMCA.”
---
|
---
| In [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f00f2091d4&e=3ee4985eea), Acting Administrator of the Small Business Administration (SBA) Chris Pilkerton writes that President Trump and the SBA are proud “to partner with makerspaces across the country . . . by offering budding entrepreneurs and those looking to enter the workforce with a means to achieve success for themselves, their families and their surrounding communities.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=adf03e806c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f487d93e9c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0cde75c0fb)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

---
Hi friend,

Yesterday, my campaign sent an update on our October goal, and I wanted to personally check in with you about it.

I’m asking for a contribution from you because my opponent, and the current representative in the 16th Congressional District, voted, at the height of Red Tide -- when dead fish rotted in our Gulf and a noxious odor filled our air -- to repeal clean water regulations that helped to keep our rivers and waterways clean. | [Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11369710/115671204/1156503122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI3NDFjNy00ZWZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tQzGdOpbUiXFUhpxbl8ZRe3B2FKv9K62npU6c4Wk4VY=&refcode=em_fr_2019.10.30_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
---
At almost every single opportunity, when our representative could have done the right thing for Florida and our country, he has done the opposite. We have to win this election in order to have a representative in Congress who will actually fight for the things people in this district need.

Campaigns cost money, though, and that’s why I need your help. An investment in this race is an investment in clean water, in fixing our healthcare system, in protecting our environment. It’s an investment in our country.

Friend, can you make a contribution to our campaign? Your contribution will put us that much closer to the outcome we need.

**Here’s the link to make a donation:[ http://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11369711/115671205/1119549850?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI3NDFjNy00ZWZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tQzGdOpbUiXFUhpxbl8ZRe3B2FKv9K62npU6c4Wk4VY=&refcode=em_fr_2019.10.30_b1_mg_all&amount=25&recurring=auto)**

Let's do this together!
Margaret

[Support Margaret »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11369712/115671206/1156503122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI3NDFjNy00ZWZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tQzGdOpbUiXFUhpxbl8ZRe3B2FKv9K62npU6c4Wk4VY=&refcode=em_fr_2019.10.30_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

name: Team Tuberville
subject: Fwd: Whole lot scarier than ghosts or goblins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
URGENT GOAL: Help Coach take on the politically correct far-left to DEFEAT Doug Jone next November!
---
| | | | | | | Peter,

This is a quick follow up to Coach's email below. Our deadline is coming up fast - tomorrow at midnight - and we hope to hear from EVERY supporter.

_**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or $20 to help us reach our October"Money Bomb" goal?](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a149b80896ee5494ab6d52a80f2e6b69c10d8ff3782f622cf1ad965afe1a80d562f4005734fd76a94d1913a701b10018b3943e8f9a9b7d3c "Will you chip in $5, $10, or $20 to help us reach our October “Money Bomb” goal?")**_

Coach is leading the Republican U.S. Senate field in the polls. But we don't maintain our momentum, that could change.

We can't let up, Peter. _**Your support right now is CRUCIAL!**_

We're just $4,139 away from our goal. _**[Help put us over the top](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a149b80896ee549420152c1e937f5ed6a87842b889c8edd1e80ca58b70973ce072b91aedef5f49cc37852e68c688205c321e4c7517b3d8f9 "Help put us over the top")**_ , so Coach can continue to take on the politically correct far-left and DEFEAT Doug Jones next November.

_**[Tap or click HERE to rush a"Money Bomb" Donation!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a149b80896ee549432344bb0b27ea6a972f2bdeab863ce0415d5756e7f7513757abf7c91a8a270d8219a6026072a7da34be285866c715143 "Tap or click HERE to rush a “Money Bomb” Donation!")**_

____________________________________________________________ From: Coach Tuberville
To: All Supporters
Date: October 29th, 2:19 PM
Subject: Whole lot scarier than ghosts or goblins
---
| [](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a149b80896ee5494da7aa6838147385e7cc45b08c6406bf839885d8f7d4bf03d1b279685645de1a405e97dfb13c23a4e7e77ad7bf43ffde9 "Click here to donate. ")
---
| | | Peter,

Halloween is almost here, and so is our October fundraising deadline.

Today, I'm writing to ask for your help.

_**[We're launching a Halloween "Money Bomb" to reach our goal, and EVERY contribution is a huge help!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a149b80896ee5494a059ce2c58adcec5107589a41faa11d07fa4bd6ac01863b68554a0ff4a9ada6aa91b92771d0ec70b927cbb3a2a00a4e3 "We’re launching a 72-hour “Money Bomb” to reach our goal, and EVERY contribution is a huge help!")**_

Truth be told, there's something a whole lot scarier than witches, ghosts, or goblins invading our country.

**Political correctness is DESTROYING the America we know and love... and now we have the Democrats rushing to embrace socialism!**

From banning prayer in our schools to demanding recognition of 63 genders to creating "safe spaces" on college campuses, political correctness is about SILENCING the truth.

I'm fed up with it, and it's a big part of why I'm running for U.S. Senate. We need more leaders in Washington like President Trump, who are not afraid to call out political correctness, speak the truth, and fight for our traditional values.

If you agree, then I need your help. We're working to raise $7,200 before our deadline tomorrow night.

_**[Please chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 today](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a149b80896ee54944d7ec525a78b7e0ef5eb35ed5e0ecc8598e90d5beb02dacdfa4bd67d22d725495b42677f95597f5b11783f72c624a8cc "Please chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 today")**_ , or more if you can, to help us reach this important goal and kick off November strong.

\- Coach Tuberville

clean_body: URGENT GOAL: Help Coach take on the politically correct far-left to DEFEAT Doug Jone next November! | | | | | | | Peter, This is a quick follow up to Coach's email below. Our deadline is coming up fast - tomorrow at midnight - and we hope to hear from EVERY supporter. "Will you chip in $5, $10, or $20 to help us reach our October “Money Bomb” goal?" Coach is leading the Republican U.S. Senate field in the polls. But we don't maintain our momentum, that could change. We can't let up, Peter. Your support right now is CRUCIAL! We're just $4,139 away from our goal. "Help put us over the top" , so Coach can continue to take on the politically correct far-left and DEFEAT Doug Jones next November. "Tap or click HERE to rush a “Money Bomb” Donation!" __________________________________________________________ From: Coach Tuberville To: All Supporters Date: October 29th, 2:19 PM Subject: Whole lot scarier than ghosts or goblins | "Click here to donate. " | | | Peter, Halloween is almost here, and so is our October fundraising deadline. Today, I'm writing to ask for your help. "We’re launching a 72-hour “Money Bomb” to reach our goal, and EVERY contribution is a huge help!" Truth be told, there's something a whole lot scarier than witches, ghosts, or goblins invading our country. Political correctness is DESTROYING the America we know and love... and now we have the Democrats rushing to embrace socialism! From banning prayer in our schools to demanding recognition of 63 genders to creating "safe spaces" on college campuses, political correctness is about SILENCING the truth. I'm fed up with it, and it's a big part of why I'm running for U.S. Senate. We need more leaders in Washington like President Trump, who are not afraid to call out political correctness, speak the truth, and fight for our traditional values. If you agree, then I need your help. We're working to raise $7,200 before our deadline tomorrow night. "Please chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 today" , or more if you can, to help us reach this important goal and kick off November strong. \- Coach Tuberville id:2019-10-14-16:33:39:791t Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc. | | | This email was sent by: Tuberville for Senate 210 Virginia Avenue, Auburn, AL, 36830 United States

name: Mike Franken
subject: Before the end of the month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Can you chip in to our campaign? In this email, I lay out just how your donations have already made a difference and set us apart in this race.
|
---

| | Thanks for being a part of the Franken for Iowa team, friends. **[In just a moment I'm going to ask you to donate to my campaign before the end of the month](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2402/33365068/4a64672d/3f8bbd7b/2610955349/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191030_fr_em"). **But first, I want to let you know how your support has laid the groundwork for us to succeed.
* We raised over $150,000 in just 5 weeks from donors just like you.
* I was the first candidate in this race to put up a television ad calling for the impeachment inquiry to proceed as a result of President Trump's actions with Ukraine's leaders. This ad was funded by our grassroots supporters.
* We had the resources necessary to stay true to our shared principles and to speak the truth -- regardless of the slanted messaging coming from the GOP.

We're putting Washington insiders on notice -- and it's working. But we're still the underdogs in this race and there's a long way to go. Now, we've got to keep the momentum going. And I need to ask for your support once again. [**Can you invest in this campaign --in an underdog -- right now? A contribution of $5 will go a long way to keeping me in this fight.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2402/33365068/4a64672d/3f8bbd7b/2610955349/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191030_fr_em") | [Contribute today](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2402/33365068/4a64672d/3f8bbd74/2610955349/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191030_fr_em_button")
---
This campaign is about what's right for Iowa -- and I believe with a thoughtful strategy backed by a solid plan to execute, we can win. We're sticking to our principles. We're getting noticed.
We can't slow our efforts now.
[**Make a contribution now before the end of the month to support our unrelenting, principles-first campaign to flip this seat.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2402/33365068/4a64672d/3f8bbd7b/2610955349/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191030_fr_em")
Very respectfully,
Mike Franken
|
---

| | Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---

body:

Jason Lewis reported $400,000 raised in his first six weeks, and we know Mitch McConnell and special interests are going to pour money into his campaign.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Alabama abortion ban blocked in court!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, A federal judge blocked Alabama's pending near-total abortion ban that most certainly would have shuttered clinics and placed those seeking abortion in danger. However, the judge's blocking of the law is only while the case makes its way up the courts \-- meaning that there is still the possibility that it will become law if ultimately upheld. If that happens, other states would have the impetus and judicial backing to pass their own laws, severely curtailing abortion access in much of the country. With the Supreme Court reviewing a Louisiana case involving a restrictive abortion law nearly identical to a Texas law the court struck down in 2016, this future is much closer than it seems. Public opinion has remained steady in support of abortion \-- according to a recent study, 54 percent support it being legal in most or all cases, holding nearly the same since 2014. This same study found that support for abortion amongst Democrats has only grown since 2014, rising from 67 percent to 70 percent. We need to know what Democrats think about this race so we are ready for whatever the GOP throws at us in 2020: **Are you pro-choice?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc40/6e9863e8/15f190f3/1db08bea/93926819/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/9mHBZ-MA") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc40/6e9863e8/15f190f3/1db08bea/93926819/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/9mHBZ-MA") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc40/6e9863e8/15f190f3/1db08be9/93926819/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191030a.ND-b&refcode2=fduQyRylvXxD6XwlGakO")

name: Molly Keenan
subject: When Trump is cornered, he fights back -- we have to be ready
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Governor Inslee is a champion in the fight against Donald Trump.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7453?t=3&akid=7977%2E868730%2En6BmPB) Hi there, friend -- I just started my new job as Governor Inslee's campaign manager. It's great to e-meet you! While this job is new, I've been working with the Governor for a long time now. So I can tell you this with absolute certainty: **The greatest champion we have in the fight against Donald Trump is Governor Inslee.** Look, the Governor will be the first to tell you that we can't become numb to Donald Trump's daily attacks on our climate (and our country) -- after all, let's remember the facts:
> ❌ He's slashed science-based facts on climate change from government websites.
> ❌ He's nominated politicians -- not scientists -- to run federal science agencies like the EPA and Department of Energy.
> ❌ He's withdrawing from one of the most important foreign policy agreements the United States has ever forged with our allies -- the Paris Climate Accord.
I don't need to tell you how Donald Trump responds to being challenged -- he fights back with half-truths and insults. He's a child who happens to have access to a huge pocketbook -- thanks to his special interest friends. And don't think for one minute he won't come after Jay for his national leadership on climate change in 2020. [**The progress we make here in Washington state is progress emulated by activists and lawmakers across the country -- tomorrow's deadline and reaching our $25,000 goal is important to keep up the fight. Donate $1 or more now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7453?t=4&akid=7977%2E868730%2En6BmPB) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7454?t=5&akid=7977%2E868730%2En6BmPB)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: This should spook you 👻
body:
Just as our Special Forces operators were engaged in a fight to take down the leader of an international terrorist group, a member of the United States House of Representatives stood on American soil, enthusiastically addressing and promoting a group that has been designated by the UAE as a "terrorist organization".
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352035-818849-4699163-ddc913508d-aa4a6778f9)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352035-818849-4699162-951aa40afa-aa4a6778f9) Just as our Special Forces operators were engaged in a fight to take down the leader of an international terrorist group, a member of the United States House of Representatives **stood on American soil** , enthusiastically addressing and **promoting a** group that has been designated by the UAE as a "**terrorist organization** ".

The following day, two hours after President Trump announced the death of the leader of ISIS, this same member of Congress posted a picture on Instagram proudly wearing a shirt, blazoned with the logo of the same group that is linked to terrorism.

In that picture, this member of Congress is standing and smiling next to, Hassan Shibly, who has sued the Trump administration to defend a woman who joined ISIS and married TWO ISIS terrorists. This "ISIS Bride" also made the statement that she wanted to **kill innocent Americans in the name of ISIS**.

But it didn't stop there.

After another few hours, this Congressperson, in an attempt to shift the narrative away from Islamic terrorism, which she enables, posted this on Twitter:

> "We must confront the hateful ideology of white nationalism and treat it like the national security threat that it is."
Want to take a guess who this elected member of Congress is?

.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.

You guessed it, Democrat Rep. Ilhan Omar.

If that's not an attempt to send a message of support to our enemies, I don't know what is.

**This is why I am fighting to become a member of Congress.** [**Your support is vital to make that happen.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352035-818849-4699162-951aa40afa-aa4a6778f9)

I want to be able to stand on the floor of the House Chamber, live on CSPAN, and **initiate a vote to EXPEL Ilhan Omar from Congress**.

Our Constitution binds our elected officials to their oath of office.

Ilhan Omar, with her hand on the Quran, swore, "I will support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic . . ."

She has done the opposite, and should be the sixth person in the history of our Republic to be expelled from Congress.

[**Will you help me make that happen?**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352035-818849-4699162-951aa40afa-aa4a6778f9)

If given the privilege to serve in Washington, I will expose Ilhan Omar and any other member of Congress who betrays their oath of office.

Following the guidelines of our Constitution, **I will work to have trojan-horse enemies within, expelled from office**.

All I need is for you to help me get to Washington [**by supporting my campaign today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352035-818849-4699162-951aa40afa-aa4a6778f9).

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. There has been a lot of chatter about "impeaching" members of Congress, but the Constitution makes it clear that members of the House or Senate can be expelled from office with a two-thirds vote. Only five members of Congress have ever been expelled from office. Ilhan Omar has betrayed her oath of office by openly supporting multiple terrorist organizations and terror-tied groups. [**Let 's make her the sixth Congressional expulsion in the history of our nation.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352035-818849-4699162-951aa40afa-aa4a6778f9)

P.P.S. After you donate, please forward this email to your friends and family members so that they are aware of Ilhan Omar's actions that betray all of us.

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352035-818849-4699162-951aa40afa-aa4a6778f9)
Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
