name: Team Beto
subject: We have no doubt about this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Hi,

Beto was recently asked about how he feels about his standing in the race
and if he wishes he was doing better. This was the answer he gave:

"Look, I would love to be doing a lot better, that’s for sure. But I
gotta tell you, I am so grateful for the extraordinary supporters and
volunteers... I wish that enthusiasm and dedication was reflected in the
polls."

No matter where Beto is in the polls, he’s proud of our campaign and what
we stand for. There is no doubt in our minds that we have the most
incredible, hardworking supporters in this race. Supporters like you are
the reason we can run a grassroots-funded campaign without a single cent
from PACs or special interests.

But like Beto said, we really wish this was reflected in the polls and in
the media. Here are the problems we’re facing:

* Beto has been bombarded by attack ads from Trump and Republican allies
like the NRA. They know that Beto actually believes what he says ––
and that terrifies them.
* We still haven’t received the qualifying polls we need to join the
November debate. Beto wants to make sure that everyone in the U.S. has
a chance to meet him and talk about our future, but because of his
unique approach we haven’t gotten the polls we need yet.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41433?refcode=ema20191030-64538&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=64538%2E444211%2E0-OvbD ]Will you step up today to help us overcome these challenges and make
sure support for Beto shines through this next leg of the race?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41433?refcode=ema20191030-64538&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=64538%2E444211%2E0-OvbD ]Contribute $3

But we have a plan to come back. Yes, we’re going to run ads, but we’re
also going to use our best asset: people.

But you probably know what the catch is: our plan is expensive. This isn’t
going to be easy, but as you know Beto isn’t one to be concerned with
odds.

This is a defining moment for our campaign and we need you now more than
ever. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41433?refcode=ema20191030-64538&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=64538%2E444211%2E0-OvbD ]It would make an incredible difference if everyone reading this
email right now chipped in $3 or anything they can to make
sure Beto’s message remains strong in this race.

– Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41433?refcode=ema20191030-64538&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=64538%2E444211%2E0-OvbD ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191030footer&t=1023&refcode2=64538_444211_0-OvbD&akid=64538%2E444211%2E0-OvbD

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=64538%2E444211%2E0-OvbD

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Zac Plantz via Team Lipinski
subject: Peter, I’m Zac!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter—

This is Zac, and I’m a staffer on Dan’s campaign. I wanted to reach out to you before our end of month deadline tomorrow.
Dan has been traveling across the district meeting with constituents and talking about commonsense solutions that will cut through the noise in Washington. But, political extremists from both sides of the aisle have been attacking Dan, so we need to double down on our organizing to fight back.

Can you make a contribution to our Fall Organizing Fund now? We have $3,960 left to raise before midnight tomorrow.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_2_3&amount=15&recurring=true]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below.
Donate $15 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_2_3&amount=15&express_lane=true]

Donate $25 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_2_3&amount=25&express_lane=true]

Donate $50 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_2_3&amount=50&express_lane=true]

Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_2_3&amount=15&recurring=true]

Face-to-face interaction is still the best way to make sure voters know about Dan’s priorities.
Grassroots organizing is essential to winning elections, so keeping our volunteers out in the field is mission-critical.
Rush a grassroots donation right away:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_2_3&amount=15&recurring=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191030_2_3&amount=15&recurring=true]

Thank you,

Zac Plantz
Staffer @ Lipinski HQ

Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to like Dan on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/danlipinskiforcongress/] or follow Dan on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DanLipinski] . If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can click here to support Dan’s reelection now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-general?refcode=footer&amount=20&recurring=auto]

PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS

Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/35ff93db-5afb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68/37ff93db-5afb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2ZmOTNkYi01YWZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v2MUQgPhx7zMV8wsW3tr7gcKYLMAK_Yy0qYiUr_TO8U=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com]

Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs, IL 60558
United States

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Five sentences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Our October fundraising deadline is tomorrow night. Can you chip in whatever you can to make sure we close the gap with the other side? | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771491/691c9bd/6fecafec/11a78cd5/723340162/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

If there's one thing I hear time and again, it's that Coloradans are fed up with Cory Gardner and the games he's playing in Washington.

We're ready to turn the page--but with Mitch McConnell going all in to help Gardner win re-election, we can't afford to fall further behind. It's on us to meet or exceed every fundraising goal we set.

[**_Our October fundraising deadline is tomorrow night. Will you chip in whatever you can to make sure we close the gap with the other side?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191030_JH_20191030-fr-JH-EOM5-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191030_JH_20191030-fr-JH-EOM5-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
John
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771491/691c9bd/6fecafec/11a78cd0/723340162/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771491/691c9bd/6fecafec/11a78cd1/723340162/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771491/691c9bd/6fecafec/11a78cce/723340162/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771491/691c9bd/6fecafec/11a78ccf/723340162/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771491/691c9bd/6fecafec/11a78ccc/723340162/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771491/691c9bd/6fecafec/11a78ccd/723340162/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771491/691c9bd/6fecafec/11a78cd0/723340162/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro_on_MSNBC?=
subject: TRAGIC mistake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Julian just went on MSNBC to send out an urgent call to action. **He MUST raise $800K by tomorrow's End of Month Deadline -- or he will be forced out of this race for good.** **[_Will you step up to answer Juli an's call with $5? He's had our backs every single second of his race -- now he needs us to have his back. (Your gift will be matched!) >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b2_jcmsnbc_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b2_jcmsnbc_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
---

Billionaire Tom Steyer just wrote a $47 MILLION check to buy his way to the next debates.

subject: brief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
MJ isn't afraid of a fight. She knows that this will be a tough race, but that we can win it if we're in it together.

|

name: Matt's iPad
subject: They gave me no choice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
I just got out of a meeting so I will be brief:
---
| | | | | | I just got out of a meeting so I will be brief: All that I've asked for is fairness and honesty from the Democrats regarding impeachment. As President Trump's top defender, I must hold them to a higher standard. Unfortunately, between Nadler, Nancy, and Schiff, the Democrats are running a completely biased investigation behind closed doors - selectively leaking information to the Democrat Communications Department (the mainstream fake-news media). This kangaroo court has to end and the Democrats gave me no choice but to file an ethics complaint against Adam Socialist Schiff. He lied to the American people, fabricated President Trump's call with President Zelensky, lied AGAIN about 'Russian Collusion', and blocked sitting members of Congress from attending impeachment depositions. Schiff must be held accountable. If you feel the same as I do, [CLICK HERE TO DONATE TO THE STOP SCHIFF FUND!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hv-z0S0D06IJWxQfVknFyvf5Agch8Z1IIJkFGvjIQ4WrPqRl4iBfbDO1R0p24LnoQ1sjTI2Qw6-fsda4zKTWQG-BkId37uApeKjNbkou-T3wsArpDiEn56vjaa4c-RNIMhg0RpaMV1mHKsdJTu5iq5jpr6BD67DF6ncUKChoSZI=&c=xc6G3RFN8eKlkqFfaxmbB5RC6BqeiLG9pqHFOXTvcVJ2cs_eFHIQPg==&ch=LMP7Kry-Ip3bBUnFcP1M6UnLPWpR5dzsDO3NMSR2Nspp7UAbWmSGdQ==)

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. Our campaign is facing a powerfully important test.

Tomorrow, we'll hit the next fundraising deadline. Whether or not we reach our targets will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward.

The pressure is on. Our campaign is working hard to hit our ambitious goal for this month. But here's what you're not going to see me do:

You won't see me holding any fundraisers where only the wealthy can get in by writing a big check.

You won't see me chatting up any billionaires, asking them to fund a Super PAC.

And you definitely won't see me taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests.

**There's only one way we're raising money on this campaign, and it's with grassroots donors like you. We're building a movement to fight for working people and we're making sure we answer only to working people.**

[**Can you chip in right now to help hit our goal before tomorrow's fundraising deadline? $2 or whatever you can will make a real difference today.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528c1e/45c30650/101f6d1ab/66f2846d/2366065232/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1LMVFGX0VPTV9CSU9fRV8yMDE5MTAzMF9WMVMxX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK1QF_EOM_BIO_E_20191030_V1S1_P_T2")

>
We know the big problems we're up against.

And we know that we need big, structural change to solve those problems.

We need to get organized -- person to person, face to face -- by investing in grassroots, on-the-ground community-building across the country. And we need to lay out big plans to solve real problems.

That's the only way to win in 2020, and we've gotten started. But, we need real resources to keep growing our movement. And right now, we're not where we need to be.

**Before the deadline tomorrow, we need to get our fundraising numbers in the best place possible.**

[**I can't thank you enough for everything you do as a member of this team, and I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important. Will you make a donation to our campaign before the coming fundraising deadline?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528c1e/45c30650/101f6d1ab/66f2846d/2366065232/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1LMVFGX0VPTV9CSU9fRV8yMDE5MTAzMF9WMVMxX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK1QF_EOM_BIO_E_20191030_V1S1_P_T2")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

subject: Fight back
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11374882/115722660/1624370312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDQxNzhhMi02NmZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wFiDRSMs-ZeFzHkOZ0GgnBfH0pA8O626kDmqk-hqUUI=&emci=b3ac1cda-64fb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=504178a2-66fb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311)
---
| Aloha, friend — **This month has seen it all:** **First instead of boycotting the biased DNC debate, Tulsi took our fight directly to the national stage** , calling out _CNN_ and _The New York Times_ to their faces for their blatant and despicable pre-debate attempts to smear Tulsi as a “Putin Puppet”, discredit her record and dismiss our diverse and growing movement as a bunch of “Unusual Americans” — a label we’re proud to own. **Next Hillary Clinton stepped out from behind the curtain** with an outrageous attack — accusing Tulsi, a combat veteran with two tours of duty in the Middle East and soldier of 16 years - of being a Russian asset... clearly revealing her part in these ongoing attacks on our campaign by the corporate media elite and establishment forces. **we’re at a critical moment in the campaign, with Tulsi hitting two new debate-qualifying polls in the past two days that show her steady rise despite establishment attacks.** It’s clearly Tulsi vs. The Establishment and this is a fight that she was born to win. Friend, these McCarthyist attacks are only just getting started. And the only way we can beat them is by standing together, stronger and louder than ever before. **[Will you help us smash our end of month fundraising deadline with our biggest show of support to-date? Pitch in $25 — or whatever you can afford right now — and let’s show Tulsi we’re up for this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11374884/115722662/-1363700792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDQxNzhhMi02NmZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wFiDRSMs-ZeFzHkOZ0GgnBfH0pA8O626kDmqk-hqUUI=&refcode=em191030_ask&amount=25&refcode2=504178a2-66fb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68)** _(There’s more: When the NYT elite tried to dismiss and deride our movement as deplorables, the people stood up and declared_ #UnusualAmericans _a badge of honor. We even designed a t-shirt that has already sold out twice. In order to celebrate the_ #UnusualAmericans _who make our campaign great, and our campaign strong,[**we’ll draw 25 lucky winners to receive a free tee out of everyone who donates $25 or more between now and midnight on October 31st. Donate now, to enter the drawing.)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11374885/115722663/-1363700792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDQxNzhhMi02NmZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wFiDRSMs-ZeFzHkOZ0GgnBfH0pA8O626kDmqk-hqUUI=&refcode=em191030_ask&refcode2=504178a2-66fb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68)_ [PITCH-IN $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11374893/115722671/279921833?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDQxNzhhMi02NmZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wFiDRSMs-ZeFzHkOZ0GgnBfH0pA8O626kDmqk-hqUUI=&refcode=em191030_button&amount=25&refcode2=504178a2-66fb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) Last week Tulsi announced that she’s not seeking re-election to Congress — her focus has always been on how to best serve We, the People, not on seeking a “political career”. She’s all-in for the fight ahead, and we need to show her we’re “all-in” with her. Will you help Tulsi become our next Commander in Chief? clean_body: | | | | Aloha, friend — This month has seen it all: First instead of boycotting the biased DNC debate, Tulsi took our fight directly to the national stage , calling out CNN and The New York Times to their faces for their blatant and despicable pre-debate attempts to smear Tulsi as a “Putin Puppet”, discredit her record and dismiss our diverse and growing movement as a bunch of “Unusual Americans” — a label we’re proud to own. Next Hillary Clinton stepped out from behind the curtain with an outrageous attack — accusing Tulsi, a combat veteran with two tours of duty in the Middle East and soldier of 16 years - of being a Russian asset... clearly revealing her part in these ongoing attacks on our campaign by the corporate media elite and establishment forces. we’re at a critical moment in the campaign, with Tulsi hitting two new debate-qualifying polls in the past two days that show her steady rise despite establishment attacks. It’s clearly Tulsi vs. The Establishment and this is a fight that she was born to win. Friend, these McCarthyist attacks are only just getting started. And the only way we can beat them is by standing together, stronger and louder than ever before. (There’s more: When the NYT elite tried to dismiss and deride our movement as deplorables, the people stood up and declared #UnusualAmericans a badge of honor. We even designed a t-shirt that has already sold out twice. In order to celebrate the #UnusualAmericans who make our campaign great, and our campaign strong, Last week Tulsi announced that she’s not seeking re-election to Congress — her focus has always been on how to best serve We, the People, not on seeking a “political career”. She’s all-in for the fight ahead, and we need to show her we’re “all-in” with her. Will you help Tulsi become our next Commander in Chief? Let’s work together to usher in a new era of peace and prosperity, for all Americans. Thank you for all that you do, and will continue to do, in fighting back. | Wow, team, this CNN takeaway left us STUNNED:

[CNN New Hampshire Poll:
"Historically low percentage for the candidates leading the field and a TON of folks who say they are undecided"](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaea6/134673f2/a340824/6997f6ff/1411149711/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_103019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Other candidates have been building celebrity-like political status for years or decades on viral moments and catchy slogans.

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: "Sen. Susan Collins's (R-Maine) approval rating is deeply underwater about a year ahead of her reelection race..."
body:
After 22 years...

[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ccd/4bef7a87/6b341c35/287fc756/2616937960/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMzAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191030-1-full")
Friends,
Susan Collins wants to have it both ways. She wants to label herself an "independent voice," but she consistently falls in line behind Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump. Time and time again, she's put their agenda ahead of Mainers, like she did when she cast a deciding vote for Trump's nominee, Brett Kavanaugh.
Now, Collins is more vulnerable than ever:
**" Sen. Susan Collins's (R-Maine) approval rating is deeply underwater about a year ahead of her reelection race..."**
**-_The Hill, 10/15_**
We finally have a chance to defeat Susan Collins and elect a Senator who puts Maine first. Will you help us do it?
[**Rush a $3 contribution before our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline hits tomorrow (10/31) at midnight. This really is important.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ccd/4bef7a87/6b341c35/287fc756/2616937960/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMzAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191030-1-full")
This news proves that Sara Gideon can win. It won't be easy, and it certainly won't be cheap. But if we're willing to put in the hard work, we can flip this Senate seat.
\- Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ccd/4bef7a87/6b341c35/287fc756/2616937960/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMzAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191030-1-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ccd/4bef7a87/6b341c35/287fc755/2616937960/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ccd/4bef7a87/6b341c35/287fc754/2616937960/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We need your voice to support children's healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The GOP has made it their m.o. to take away healthcare from anyone and everyone -- they led an unsuccessful campaign to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and when that failed, they took it court and may undo the whole thing. The Children's Health Insurance Program helps states provide health insurance to families with children, extending much-needed coverage to 8.9 million children in America. Now, under the GOP's watch, the rate of uninsured children has risen, and they haven't expanded CHIP to cover the gaps created. They are leaving millions of children dangerously uninsured. [**We need you to stand up and show your support today. Please add your name to ours and urge Congress to expand CHIP so that children can grow up happy and healthy!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc41/6e9863e8/15f31994/1db08bfe/3105607565/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/expandchip/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for supporting our children. clean_body: | | | Hello Peter, The GOP has made it their m.o. to take away healthcare from anyone and everyone -- they led an unsuccessful campaign to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and when that failed, they took it court and may undo the whole thing. The Children's Health Insurance Program helps states provide health insurance to families with children, extending much-needed coverage to 8.9 million children in America. Now, under the GOP's watch, the rate of uninsured children has risen, and they haven't expanded CHIP to cover the gaps created. They are leaving millions of children dangerously uninsured. "" Thank you for supporting our children. The WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

name: =?utf-8?Q?Unite=20the=20Country?=
subject: Thank you for signing on to Unite the Country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, www
body:
Thank you for signing on to Unite the Country and our fight to defeat Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden president. |
---
| |
---
| | Peter,
Thank you for signing on to Unite the Country and our fight to defeat Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden president.

In 2016, Donald Trump used social media to spread fake news and manipulate the outcome of the election. The Russian government used social media to spread misinformation in support of his campaign too.

Now, Trump is repeating his 2016 playbook, spending heavily on false ads attacking Joe Biden. We’re also seeing reports of new foreign interference.

We can’t wait any longer to support and defend Joe from these false smears and take the fight to Donald Trump. That’s the goal of Unite the Country -- and that’s where you come in.

**Watch our announcement video and share it on social media to help spread the word.**
[](https://unitethecountry.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50e02386c650c6ce2d08b271a&id=db35944cd8&e=53eb77009b) **[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://unitethecountry.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50e02386c650c6ce2d08b271a&id=db35944cd8&e=53eb77009b)** **[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://unitethecountry.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50e02386c650c6ce2d08b271a&id=931ab09cdb&e=53eb77009b)**
We’ll be in touch with more updates that will arm you with videos, articles and all the facts you need to join the fight.

In the meantime, thank you for signing on,

Unite The Country

subject: Let's take back America NOW!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
We're up against formidable opponents, but the odds are in our favor. |
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=063d600d56&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| Friend,

We all know Cory Booker, the egotistical con man, has to go. **Hirsh Singh has been on the forefront of that fight, calling him out at every turn. But he needs**** _your_****help.**

New Jerseyans pay some of the highest taxes in the country and what do we get for that? Because of Democrat policies, we get poverty, crime, failing infrastructure and an assault on our children’s futures.

Republican U.S. Senate Candidate Hirsh Singh pledges to:
---
| |
* Stop illegal immigration and protect our borders
* Defend the Second Amendment
* Defend and promote LIFE
* Repair our infrastructure
* Support religious freedom
* Fix education and eliminate Common Core

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $20.20 FOR 2020](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=2362c564a5&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE $20.20 FOR 2020")
---
| Friend, our campaign is possible because of generous contributions from people like you — people who believe that America is the greatest nation in the history of the world; indeed, a nation _worth_ defending against leftist extremism and tyranny.

**The Democrats are vulnerable; they’ve exposed their soft underbellies with baseless attempts to undo all the good President Trump has accomplished.**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $20.20 FOR 2020](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=e239d99ef1&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE $20.20 FOR 2020")
---
| Our campaign has exposed Cory the con man for the corrupt liar that he’s always been. **_That’s_****why we’re getting nationwide attention.**

Republicans across the country want to see ‘Spartacus’ removed from politics and see our state return to prosperity. New Jersey is winnable — but _only if we keep sticking together_.

Since we began, we’ve received contributions from donors across all fifty states, plus over 360 towns and cities in just New Jersey. Our average contributor gives over $45 and many of our supporters have pledged automatic monthly donations of $10, $20, $50 as well as $100 or more.

**_Together, we can make New Jersey a Republican state FOR THE PEOPLE._** Help us fight the Democrats by chipping in $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or more — whatever you can manage.

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $500](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=64465a4b22&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE $500")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $250](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=2f9a7dea32&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE $250")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $100](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=2ca29783c6&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE $100")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=a1a16aab66&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE $50")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $25](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=9603c86048&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE $25")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=c421a44897&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT")
---
| Every dollar matters and no effort is too small. Thank you for your time and generous help.

**— Team Hirsh Singh**
_For the People_

* * *

P.S. For far too long, New Jerseyans have suffered from Democrat abuse; now is the time to **take back our state**.

It’s not too late to send Cory Booker packing for good and save our state from corruption. Your contribution to the Singh For Senate campaign helps restore American values to New Jersey. And if you’re a Jerseyan yourself, please remember to vote Republican next week on November 5th to stop Phil Murphy!

To learn more about Hirsh, please join us at [SinghForThePeople.com](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=7799294fe1&e=3e017fab0f)

body:
**In case you missed Greg 's email yesterday, he shared a memo from Barack Obama's former senior advisor, Dan Pfeiffer, explaining how we will win in Arizona in 2020.**

According to Dan, we can win back Arizona by turning out new voters at a record pace, but it will require a substantial investment of resources.

[**Donate to help Greg get new voters to the polls in Arizona »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_8dh-AxRJNbJHdhLrHuyW_PSttKqnOyyxGUZ3AGZWVU=/l5emSf7kbwcn4T8wS7ZtL9P1F3BpsPcHkAlRTeBIbJc=?refcode=X_102919_EOM_B&amount=25&recurring=auto)

_For the rest of October, our campaign is doubling-down on our commitment to our 2020 Turn-Out-The-Vote Fund, and all contributions made from our emails will go directly to this important fund._

**That means that if you donate right now, from this email, your donation will go directly toward our efforts to turn out new voters in Arizona in 2020! **

fundraising goal.

We just got the latest update on our fundraising progress. This is how

this race. Please chip in $3 or anything you can before our
deadline tomorrow night.

name: Preston Elliott, MJ for Texas
subject: This is a fight we can win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I've worked on a lot of tough races over the years and have seen what kind of candidates can get the job done. MJ has the mix of tenacity and leadership needed to defeat John Cornyn, win Texas' Senate

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890889/7f51f7bc/4b2777d4/4ef34060/1026379705/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter -- Let me introduce myself. I'm Preston, MJ's campaign manager.

I've worked on a lot of tough races over the years and have seen what kind of candidates can get the job done. MJ has the mix of tenacity and leadership needed to **defeat John Cornyn, win Texas ' Senate seat, and make sure we have a Senator who actually works for the people.** [**Chip in to help MJ win!**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890889/7f51f7bc/4b2777d4/4ef34067/1026379705/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5In0%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-n?refcode=welc3_n__49__&amount=10") That's not to say this race will be an easy one. John Cornyn has spent nearly two decades in the Senate cozying up to big donors, and has taken _millions_ in corporate PAC money over the years. So, it's no surprise that as a Senator, he has put the interests of his big donors over those of the people: he voted to gut protections for millions of Texans with pre-existing conditions; he voted against a bill that would have reduced the price of prescription drugs; he voted to undo financial protections that would benefit deployed servicemembers. The list goes on and on.

Meanwhile, MJ's a fighter. She served three tours in Afghanistan and she took on the government to help open ground combat roles to women. **We deserve better and[we can do better with your help.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890889/7f51f7bc/4b2777d4/4ef34067/1026379705/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5In0%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-n?refcode=welc3_n__49__&amount=10")**

And here's the other reason we need MJ to win: The path to taking back control of the Senate goes straight through Texas. If we want to send Mitch McConnell and John Cornyn packing and start passing policies that actually help Americans, we need to win this race.

**Peter, grassroots support will be absolutely critical to defeating John Cornyn.** He's an entrenched incumbent with big bucks behind him. So we need to build a massive people-powered campaign to successfully take him on -- and that starts with you.

**Will you make a donation to show your support for Team MJ and join the fight to unseat John Cornyn?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890889/7f51f7bc/4b2777d4/4ef34066/1026379705/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5In0%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-n?express_lane=true&refcode=welc3_n__49__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890889/7f51f7bc/4b2777d4/4ef34065/1026379705/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5In0%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-n?express_lane=true&refcode=welc3_n__49__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890889/7f51f7bc/4b2777d4/4ef3405b/1026379705/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5In0%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-n?express_lane=true&refcode=welc3_n__49__&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890889/7f51f7bc/4b2777d4/4ef3405a/1026379705/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5In0%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-n?express_lane=true&refcode=welc3_n__49__&amount=100")**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890889/7f51f7bc/4b2777d4/4ef34059/1026379705/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5In0%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-n?refcode=welc3_n__49__")****
As MJ would say, "saddle up!" This is going to be a fun ride.

\-- Preston, Campaign Manager

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890889/7f51f7bc/4b2777d4/4ef3405f/1026379705/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5In0%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-n?refcode=welc3_n_db__49__&amount=10")

|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: What a "Halloween Night" - Thank you
body:
I can't believe the support- thank you | |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8443ff23db&e=f6564bbe3b) | [Tweet](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cd862ea7d8&e=f6564bbe3b)

---|---
|
## Wow- Thank you!
---
|
---
|
---
---
| | What a "Halloween Night"! Thank you. I am truly humbled by the tremendous support. We've worked hard to improve our scores, but we definitely wouldn't still be in this without your votes. So thank you for taking the time to send 10 texts and login online each Monday night.

The "Halloween Night" episode was so cool to be a part of. The makeup, the costumes, the special effects and the set design - it was all unbelievable.

We are already back in the studio working hard on our dance for next week's show. Our next dance style is jazz and I hope we can continue to improve and earn your votes.
---
| If you aren't already, follow along on my Instagram, @seanmspicer, to see more of the behind the scenes content throughout the week.

Thanks again,

_Sean_
---
|

|
---
|

body:

| | **BREAKING: Castro less than 20K donors from new debate threshold** [**_I 'm so humbled by this momentum. Will you rush $5 before my 24-hour deadline to meet my $800K goal, keep me in this race, and CLINCH this new donor requirement? This moment is so historic, every gift will be matched! >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I can hardly believe it. I'm 24 hours from the biggest End of Month Deadline of my life... **And the DNC just announced Democrats need 200K donors to make the next debates --_and I 'm more than 90% of the way there!_** If you can help me clinch this new donor requirement and meet my $800K End of Month goal -- it would show HUGE momentum for us. I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart: Can I count on your immediate $5? **Every generous gift will be matched -- but only for the next 24 hours** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc85c/3eb3e2fc/558ccce6/744db9d3/2537002669/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191030_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs")**

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc85c/3eb3e2fc/558ccce6/744db9dc/2537002669/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc85c/3eb3e2fc/558ccce6/744db9db/2537002669/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc85c/3eb3e2fc/558ccce6/744db9da/2537002669/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Peter Khalil
subject: The 90-year-old Woman
body:
| | | | My campaign manager and I walk into a bar...
---
---
**—**
My Campaign Manager and I walk into a bar, and what happens next is not a joke.
We sit ourselves next to a woman who needs a bit of help getting into her seat. As, I hold her hand to help her gain her balance, I ask,
"What's your name?"
"Betty," she replied, "I'm 90 years old."
We talk for half an hour. Betty was born in 1929. She remembers the best and worst moments of our recent history: the wars, the assassinations, the resignations, the explorations, the booms, and the busts.
Before we part, Betty says something that chills me: "If something doesn't change soon, I think we're in trouble." She's referring to the current state of our government.
It means a lot when someone who has lived everything the world has thrown at us says we're in trouble. Betty's right. We _are_ in trouble.
Our politics have become so toxic that we can no longer rely on our basic institutions to see us through the wave of corruption that is inundating Washington DC at this moment in our history.
We live in a state of constant vigilance: worried what civic tradition of ours will be attacked next, knowing that nobody can hear us amid the constant noise created by our politicians, our media, and the vocal fringes of our communities.
We are so distracted by today's dysfunction that we forget that our country belongs to us. It's time for us to take it back. I am running for Congress to do exactly that _and I need your help._
I ask repeatedly for your financial support, because I am running a true grassroots campaign that depends on small donations from you. _We don't need millions to win this race,_ but we do need you to keep us sustainable.
Please make a [$5, $25, or $100 monthly-recurring contribution today](https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=W9Smq9u-2FGdEKDZ-2FVYToYN82EYAIsPurtq-2F1KZvoOmfX7VHyStsQz8tF0vhuqv9Hgm8eMk8Ay1lZ9v4TVDxWe3A-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCERHvyJx0KbFNmY2J7ZEKFKefcffNXOVKWpqwejHvWn1-2F3qFhsV-2FmaEkQjQPr-2FMffelBPPeLb2a-2BQnbGML-2Be3VxVQoAKRnilWBDdIQJz6-2FRjKK-2BZDJGq9i2xgtJSXzqurxO6Qo34K3uFeeKzh4kG9RzQWxRESAEREMGb7apRoy1FZ84nlDyJ8JUYr6BbVbmlIerYOZkXLEwG8QQVA-2FICj4Hwh30-2FeMRcX4ZVU6IQzYA8IQMehYG-2FtQoevvJmvWUwQSMWUllh4xdTEmHYimpLFfn2XEPs-2Bhl1w3-2BvK0XbWoVOnXyNSPYYMAQ2cTbo-2BZ1Bj09AG-2BuEi97ExPmqrlcYXBCHg-2BXlX93u7Nxyq4pl8QObiQ9lHHSuFWw5-2FO9ybEZXdVfV8DAUOcRUwTbKxhNVJVldVJi-2FdoaCsskIAR6k31PbCC0f6nU2fe6m9mAEBt5nWqEEcKDS6h6ojRxfiTgQBupxcLuJL7XdjaKRWth1qvhTqtuXqbyTVEMhz4sA-2FSgc12dMceHlPDyK6WCSZTXVynhU2hN2Ok3fj-2FHap-2B8N3O5XSBZHRR8ookG1uHVHPjBSLo-2BLM-2Fh8yuVFqytUo02tYgy) and make a bold statement that our country is not for sale.
With gratitude, Peter

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: America’s least-popular Senator:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| |
---
| | OFF THE SIDELINES ENDORSES AMY MCGRATH FOR SENATE IN KENTUCKY:

[**RUSH A DONATION TO AMY 'S CAMPAIGN AND DEFEAT MITCH MCCONNELL!**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIzNDYyNzQS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTg2NTgwNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| Friends,

I've always said, if you're not in Washington to help people, you should pack up and go home.

So I'd say it's time for Senator Mitch McConnell to retire.

**With Amy McGrath, we have a real shot at defeating him.** Amy's a retired marine fighter pilot who embodies everything Mitch McConnell is not: Brave, principled, and committed to doing right by the people of Kentucky.

Mitch McConnell is America's least popular Senator, with a dismal 36% approval rating in Kentucky. But he's got the backing of Trump and millions in outside money pouring into the race, so we must come together to support Amy now.

[**Please, make a donation to Amy 's campaign today: Together, we can defeat Mitch McConnell and flip the Senate.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIzNDYyNzQS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTg2NTgwNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Mitch McConnell is Trump's top enabler and obstructionist-in-chief. He has refused to take any action on lowering prescription drug prices when Kentuckians pay the second-highest amount for their medicine in the country per capita.

And he's sitting on other critical bills that have passed the House, including the Violence Against Women Reauthorization Act, the Paycheck Fairness Act, and the Climate Action Now Act.

Enough. Kentuckians deserve better than six more years of Mitch McConnell. _Americans_ deserve better than six more years of Mitch McConnell.

**This is going to be one of the tightest and most expensive races in the country, but I know Amy has what it takes. So let 's make sure she has the resources to build the strongest possible campaign.**

body:
The truth is in the headlines.

|

| | **Texas is the biggest battleground state,
and Senator Cornyn is vulnerable.
[Pitch in toward our Big as Texas goal to help seal the deal >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489088e/7f51f7bc/4b390097/4ef340f0/3161472307/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eom-oct19?refcode=email_20191030.2nd__458__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Not convinced, Peter? Take it from _The Dallas Morning News._ They wrote that "the most-watched race in Texas will be the Senate battle." Or _Politico_ \-- they reported that Cornyn and his allies are bracing for a "2020 drubbing."

_The Hill_ sounded the alarm for Cornyn, saying he's facing his "toughest race yet," and _The Washington Post_ ranked Texas' Senate seat as one of the top 10 most likely to flip!

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Mitch McConnell is a hypocrite on impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell continues to stand by Trump throughout this impeachment inquiry, and now, he's truly shown America how hypocritical he really is. He said that the House's impeachment resolution up for a vote tomorrow denies Trump "his most basic rights of due process." Ignoring the fact that he supported Trump denying migrants any due process. Ignoring the fact that he ensured Betsy DeVos's confirmation as Education Secretary, allowing her to deny due process to survivors of sexual assault. Ignoring the fact that he denied Obama's nominee for Supreme Court, Merrick Garland, his due process or even a hearing. Sadly, we know Mitch will only continue his reign of hypocrisy and conservative stonewalling as long as he's in the Senate. We need to know what Democrats think of him so we can create the best strategy to get rid of him in 2020: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc45/6e9863e8/15ecee18/1db08af7/2810728333/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/s2cvPG4q") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc45/6e9863e8/15ecee18/1db08af7/2810728333/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/s2cvPG4q") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc45/6e9863e8/15ecee18/1db08af6/2810728333/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcgrathvmitch-nd?refcode=OUT20191030c.ND-b&refcode2=VU22NeNQg169tyoW1hTz")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: We Can Fight Union Pacific
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Marc Flores for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Why do so many people in one of Houston’s poorest neighborhoods have cancer?

Many believe it is because of a cancer causing chemical released by various train companies like Union Pacific at the Englewood Railyard. This illuminating expose from The Houston Chronicle shined a light on the issue (https://www.houstonchronicle.com/business/article/Houston-neighborhood-reckons-with-railroad-yard-13753933.php?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=8c78ab622e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_16_08_11_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-8c78ab622e-32267927) .

The chemical remains below 101 households in the area. I’ve met with one of those homeowners, Joetta Stevenson. She wonders, “Did that have something to do with the breast cancer I had?”

Rather than clean up the neighborhood, Union Pacific, offered residents $1,000 to waive their rights to protest chemicals at the railyard giving residents cancer.

The bottom line is this:

We must tell Union Pacific that the lives of Houstonians are worth more than $1,000. We must force Union Pacific, a corporation that has earned $24 billion in revenue in the past year, to clean up the deadly pollution in this area.

As someone with extensive experience bringing people from the private and public sectors together, I will hold Union Pacific accountable for cleaning up the polluted neighborhoods near the Englewood Railyard.

Texas’s Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ) is asking for further monitoring and extraction efforts in the area. As your representative, I will make sure that these steps are taken, and that the actions of corporations are held to the EPA’s standards.

It’s time to put the lives of Houstonians over the needs of a multi-billion dollar corporation.

We can do better! We will do better!

- Marc

name: Josh Mahony
subject: Before midnight tomorrow.
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
I'm not sure that we can close this fundraising gap, and I need you to prove me wrong.

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-oct-eom?refcode=em191030EOM3&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| Friend,

Let's be honest, we are up against a lot in this race. Tom Cotton has a war chest of over $2 million, a slew of billionaire mega-donors, and an army of corporate PACs behind him.

Now you might be wondering, what do we have?

We have the support of everyday grassroots donors who want to see real change in Arkansas. We have the energy of Arkansas Democrats who are hungry for change. **And if all of us work together, we can beat Tom Cotton.**

**[We are still $4,931 away from our goal. If we don't meet this goal, it will send a message to Tom Cotton and the GOP that they can keep the status quo in Arkansas. Will you rush a donation of $10 right now to show them their days of promoting their self-interests instead of the interests of the people of our great state are over?](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-oct-eom?refcode=em191030EOM3&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate $10](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-oct-eom?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em191030EOM3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Bill Weld
subject: fwd: I still have hope, do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeD4no3WPwaNcSmnFwpDuA1FGx0PfqDFaDXj2XtEf8L8F0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191030_fr_s&n=1) Team — last month, I wrote to you about my hope for the future. So much has happened in the past four weeks, and sometimes the day-to-day fighting to restore sanity to the Republican Party can really wear a person down. It’s because of the involvement and engagement of people like you that we can see a path forward to America reclaiming its place as the world’s role model. Your efforts provide a roadmap to finding that which we know is most important about our collective consciousness as a nation: **the United States of America measures a nation’s value by its honor, integrity, and commitment to the rule of law.** **And if we’re going to preach it, then we damn well need to practice it.** I said it before, but here it is one more time — _There is hope that our politics won’t always be this way._ The optimism I hear on the campaign trail is only getting stronger, and our message is convincing new people to join our movement each day. But we can’t do it without you. [**So I’m humbly asking this important question: Can you chip in right now with a contribution of $20.20 to help us meet our end of month goal?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeD4no3WPwaNcSmnFwpDuA1FGx0PfqDFaDXj2XtEf8L8F0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191030_fr_s&n=2) Our team is growing, we’re getting our message to the voters, and our latest ads have President Trump on defense. Now is the time for us to push our advantage. We need your continued support to do it. Thank you for standing with me. — Bill | | [DONATE ⇨ ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeD4no3WPwaNcSmnFwpDuA1FGx0PfqDFaDXj2XtEf8L8F0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191030_fr_s&n=3)
---
\---- Forwarded message ----
**From** : Bill Weld <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : September 27, 2019
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeD4no3WPwaNcSmnFwpDuA1FGx0PfqDFaDXj2XtEf8L8F0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191030_fr_s&n=4)
I’ll be honest — this was a tough news week. It’s hard not to watch what’s going on with President Trump and his cabal of cronies and not worry about the future of our nation and our party. _But I’m here to remind you that there is still hope._
There is hope that this president will be brought to justice. There is hope that we can reclaim the Republican Party from the grips of this group of grifters. **_There is hope that our politics won’t always be this way._**
It is this optimism that I hear every day from voters across the country on the campaign trail, and it is what keeps me going — even in times like these.
It is a reminder that Americans understand that we _can_ and _must_ do better. **It is a reminder that we’ve got a real shot at winning this thing.**
[**So if you’re like me and still believe there’s hope that we can restore dignity to America and our party, I ask that you consider making a donation to my campaign**. ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeD4no3WPwaNcSmnFwpDuA1FGx0PfqDFaDXj2XtEf8L8F0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191030_fr_s&n=5)
We’ve got a very important end-or-quarter fundraising deadline coming up on Monday, and I’m hoping we can use that as an opportunity to show the American people, and the world, that there is still hope for us to turn our country around.
-Bill
| [DONATE ⇨ ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeD4no3WPwaNcSmnFwpDuA1FGx0PfqDFaDXj2XtEf8L8F0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191030_fr_s&n=6)
---
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191030_fr_s&n=7).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191030_fr_s&n=8) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191030_fr_s&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191030_fr_s&n=10), software for leaders.

Your efforts provide a roadmap to finding that which we know is most important about our collective consciousness as a nation: the United States of America measures a nation’s value by its honor, integrity, and commitment to the rule of law. subject: Governor Holcomb needs local partners
body:
Governor Holcomb has a message for you: We need to keep Indiana on the right track, and he needs a partner in cities across our state to help him... |
---
| |

| Hoosier Republican -

Governor Holcomb has a message for you: We need to keep Indiana on the right track, and he needs partners in cities across our state to help him continue Putting People First.

**And there’s one thing you can do right now to make that happen –** **cast your** **vote for your local Republican team!**

Election Day is Tuesday, and early voting is currently available. Your ballot will list your Republican mayoral and municipal candidates, and they need your support to make sure they can help Governor Holcomb take Indiana to the Next Level.
[\--> Click here to check voting locations and more! <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=85ece14e49&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Check out the video, share it on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=81fb8630f5&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=416fb38102&e=1acd9bb3d6), and then grab a few friends and head to the polls on or before Tuesday, November 5!

\- Your Indiana Republican Team

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Speaker Pelosi asked. James Carville asked. Paul Begala asked. Ted Lieu asked. Khizr Khan asked. Pramila Jayapal asked. Deb Haaland asked. [_**After my closest Democratic colleagues -- and President Obama himself -- called you to action to flip the Senate, I thought I would see a surge of support before my critical end-of-month deadline. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") **But it 's starting to look like I might not hit my goal for the first time in my entire campaign. ** I only have 24 hours to meet this deadline, WIN, and DEFEAT McConnell's Senate. Will you come through for me? | [](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
[ _**Suggested Support: $5 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
---

Truthfully, I don't like asking for money.

But I would be doing you a huge disservice if I didn't do everything in my power to ensure we have the resources to fight against Trump and McConnell.

So I'm humbly asking: Will you rush $5 before my critical end-of-month deadline in 24 hours?

| ****[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")****
---

****[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191030_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****
---

Let's win this race and take back the Senate.

Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44c/18e32a7f/539c8fc2/7b22edbc/1056414777/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44c/18e32a7f/539c8fc2/7b22edbd/1056414777/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44c/18e32a7f/539c8fc2/7b22edb2/1056414777/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44c/18e32a7f/539c8fc2/7b22edb3/1056414777/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44c/18e32a7f/539c8fc2/7b22edb0/1056414777/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44c/18e32a7f/539c8fc2/7b22edb1/1056414777/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: Nick Clemons, Team Kennedy
subject: Hi, I'm Joe Kennedy's campaign manager
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390b11/55b66746/2c3b67ba/80f3f8a/1726319435/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hi, I'm Nick. I'm the guy whose job it is to make sure we do everything we can to help send Joe to the US Senate. **These first six weeks have been incredible.** We're opening our campaign HQ this weekend. We've got volunteers streaming in the doors. And we're hitting every corner of Massachusetts building our grassroots organizing teams. Here's where you come in. We're building a campaign that's about including _everyone_. That means a campaign funded by grassroots donors, not corporate PACs or dark money. **When it comes to raising money, this is what matters to Joe --not the amount you give, but the number of people powering our movement.** [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390b11/55b66746/2c3b67ba/80f3f8b/1726319435/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-10-30-nick-intro&recurring=1&amount=3") **My goal? [ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa230/18d6a294/4cedf07b/26d63a2e/4147430752/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | **OCTOBER DEADLINE: 1 DAY AWAY
[RUSH IN A CONTRIBUTION ->](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa230/18d6a294/4cedf07b/26d63a2f/4147430752/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTEwMzAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYWxsIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme191030?refcode=jme191030_all_other")** When I launched this campaign, I made a promise to not take a dime from corporate PACs. These days, you might hear that promise a lot on the campaign trail, but it's not just empty words. Here's why it matters: when Washington politicians accept millions of dollars from wealthy special-interest groups and still no progress is made on improving healthcare, tackling the opioid epidemic, or making an economy that works for all of us -- something has to be done. **[Chip in whatever you can to help us keep up with the special-interest fundraising machine.](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa230/18d6a294/4cedf07b/26d63a2f/4147430752/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTEwMzAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYWxsIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme191030?refcode=jme191030_all_other")** Washington is broken and that's why I promised to do things differently. I'm running to serve all Tennesseans, not the special interests. After all, that's how this job is supposed to work. However, the promise I made comes with challenges: Our opponents are raking in millions from their well-connected insider networks to bankroll their campaigns. That kind of money could drown us out if we don't keep up. This campaign is fueled a few dollars at a time from folks like you. There's real power in our people driven approach. It shows that working together we can make Washington work for Tennesseans again. **[I need to know you're still in this fight with me. Will you chip in a few dollars before October is over?](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa230/18d6a294/4cedf07b/26d63a2f/4147430752/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTEwMzAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYWxsIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme191030?refcode=jme191030_all_other")** Thank you, James

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW TODAY: Overdose deaths plummet in states hit hard by drug crisis
body:
For the nearly 20 million Americans battling substance abuse today, the Trump Administration just launched a new website, FindTreatment.gov. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=217fc09770&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 30, 2019
---
| | |
# **NEW: Overdose deaths plummet in states hit hardest by drug crisis**
---
| **For the nearly 20 million** Americans battling substance abuse today, the Trump Administration just launched a new website, [FindTreatment.gov](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ccd23d1680&e=3ee4985eea), designed to help locate the best treatment options tailored to each person’s particular situation and needs.

**Despite its importance,** finding the best treatment option for those who need it most hasn’t always been easy. This new website scraps the failed one-size-fits-all approach that Washington too often favors, adopting best practices from outside of government to avoid the usual bureaucratic mess and muddle that can plague public projects.

**Now, it’s easier than ever** to learn about the full range of resources available, from understanding payment and insurance options to locating the right treatment program among the more than 13,000 state-licensed facilities across the country. 💵 _**READ** : [The full cost of the opioid crisis? $2.5 trillion over 4 years.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=34085a37f6&e=3ee4985eea)_ **America’s opioid epidemic** is one of the signature issues President Donald J. Trump identified for his Administration to tackle from day one. Before he took office, nearly 64,000 Americans had died from a drug overdose in 2016 alone. Opioid overdoses accounted for more than 42,000 of those deaths—more than any previous year on record.

**Today, that crisis** shows signs of fading. The United States saw a 5.1% decline in overdose deaths in 2018, including 24% and 17% drops respectively in the hard-hit states of Ohio and Kentucky. Today’s launch will aim to improve those figures even more.

**“We designed it** with human-centered principles in mind,” White House Counselor Kellyanne Conway said. “We used real words for real people.”

[“Overdose deaths drop sharply in States hard hit by opioid crisis.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0292aee17f&e=3ee4985eea)

**Help is available:** Visit [FindTreatment.gov](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=801f0092f2&e=3ee4985eea) or share it with a loved one today.
---
|
---
|
# **First and Second Lady deliver a message on disaster preparedness**
---
| **Today,** **First Lady Melania Trump** and Second Lady Karen Pence traveled together to South Carolina in a joint effort to highlight emergency preparedness. The two visited both a local elementary school and nearby military base.

**At Lambs Elementary,** Mrs. Trump and Mrs. Pence stopped by a classroom packed with more than 50 students learning about the Red Cross’ Pillowcase Project, an emergency response program for children to help them better prepare for natural disasters. Going table to table, the First and Second Ladies greeted the fifth graders and asked what each would put into their pillowcases in the event of an emergency. Before departing, they handed out small flashlights.

**The next stop** was Joint Base Charleston, where the two met with service members and their families. They thanked the troops for their hard work on behalf of our Nation and learned about the base’s capabilities for disaster response, relief, and recovery.

[More about today’s trip with the First Lady and Second Lady](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e86d3f7c7&e=3ee4985eea)
---

clean_body: For the nearly 20 million Americans battling substance abuse today, the Trump Administration just launched a new website, FindTreatment.gov. | | | | | The White House • October 30, 2019 | | | NEW: Overdose deaths plummet in states hit hardest by drug crisis | For the nearly 20 million Americans battling substance abuse today, the Trump Administration just launched a new website, , designed to help locate the best treatment options tailored to each person’s particular situation and needs. Despite its importance, finding the best treatment option for those who need it most hasn’t always been easy. This new website scraps the failed one-size-fits-all approach that Washington too often favors, adopting best practices from outside of government to avoid the usual bureaucratic mess and muddle that can plague public projects. Now, it’s easier than ever to learn about the full range of resources available, from understanding payment and insurance options to locating the right treatment program among the more than 13,000 state-licensed facilities across the country. 💵 READ : America’s opioid epidemic is one of the signature issues President Donald J. Trump identified for his Administration to tackle from day one. Before he took office, nearly 64,000 Americans had died from a drug overdose in 2016 alone. Opioid overdoses accounted for more than 42,000 of those deaths—more than any previous year on record. Today, that crisis shows signs of fading. The United States saw a 5.1% decline in overdose deaths in 2018, including 24% and 17% drops respectively in the hard-hit states of Ohio and Kentucky. Today’s launch will aim to improve those figures even more. “We designed it with human-centered principles in mind,” White House Counselor Kellyanne Conway said. “We used real words for real people.” Help is available: Visit or share it with a loved one today. | | First and Second Lady deliver a message on disaster preparedness | Today, First Lady Melania Trump and Second Lady Karen Pence traveled together to South Carolina in a joint effort to highlight emergency preparedness.
